# Vendor: Akakooluo Customer Service Scripts

> **Source:** https://github.com/akakooluo-ai/customer-service-scripts
> **License:** MIT (Copyright 2026 快语团队 / TalkQ Team)
> **Purpose:** Reference library untuk template customer service scripts.
> Digunakan sebagai inspirasi/bahan referensi saat ada konsumen GrowthForge
> dengan kebutuhan customer service (e-commerce, marketplace, dll).

## Struktur

```
vendor/akakooluo-customer-service-scripts/
├── general/          → presales.md, sales.md, aftersales.md (script umum)
├── industries/       → 30 industri (beauty, fashion, food, electronics, dll)
├── platforms/        → per platform (Amazon, Shopee, TikTok Shop)
├── scripts/          → script templates
├── skills/           → customer service reply skills
├── tasks/            → task templates
├── docs/             → dokumentasi
└── README.md         → readme original
```

## Cara Pakai

1. Cari skenario yang relevan di `general/` (presales/sales/aftersales)
2. Cari industri yang cocok di `industries/`
3. Cari platform yang relevan di `platforms/`
4. Adaptasi ke format GrowthForge (bahasa Indonesia, tone Lia, batasan paket)

## Aturan

- **Jangan copy-paste langsung** ke persona konsumen
- **Adaptasi** ke konteks GrowthForge (tone, batasan, scope paket)
- **Hapus** referensi spesifik kompetitor (Amazon/Shopee/TikTok) jika tidak relevan
- **Simpan** atribusi MIT License
